persona.name: Lisa Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Help students find their creative voice and appreciate diverse art forms
persona.knowledge_scope: Art history, various artistic techniques, contemporary art movements
persona.backstory: Working artist who exhibits in local galleries while teaching full-time

surrounding_conversation.content: Alex, Chloe, how are you two doing? Ready for lunch?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Gloria Washington

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Lisa, have you seen any thought-provoking art lately? I'm looking for some inspiration.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Alex Rivera

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Alex, did you hear about the math book that got arrested? It had too many problems!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ethan Brown

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Alex, how's your project coming along? Need any tips?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Lisa Patel

surrounding_conversation.content: Actually, Alex, I recently saw an incredible exhibit blending traditional and digital art. It might give you some fresh ideas!

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Let's move to the hallway, everyone! Stay together!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Emma Rodriguez

actions.dialog_text: Hey Alex, how's your project coming along? Need any tips?
actions.plan: I should check on Alex and see if they need any help with their art project.

actions.dialog_text: Actually, Alex, I recently saw an incredible exhibit blending traditional and digital art. It might give you some fresh ideas!
actions.plan: Alex seems to be seeking inspiration for their project. I should share some recent art I’ve seen to spark their creativity.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay calm! We need to move to a safe spot—follow me!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot—there’s an active shooter. I need to get away from here and find a safe place to hide.

actions.dialog_text: Karen, Emma, let’s find a place to hide—stay quiet and follow me.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to find a hiding spot quickly to stay safe.

memories.description: Approached Alex Rivera to offer assistance with their art project.
Shared details about a recent art exhibit with Alex Rivera to inspire their project.
Heard a gunshot and decided to lead others to safety by moving to hallway2.
Decided to lead Karen and Emma to the women's bathroom to hide from the shooter.
